title: Ryo Yamada Totem (Bocchi The Rock)
description: Now you can use Ryo Yamada as you totem
body:
🎧 Ryo Yamada Totem Resourcepack — *Bocchi the Rock! Edition*  
Carry cool rebellion—replace your Totem of Undying with Ryo Yamada from *Bocchi the Rock!*  
This resourcepack transforms the vanilla totem into a custom Ryo model, perfect for fans of her aloof charm, bass guitar vibes, and iconic fashion.

✨ Features  
✅ Replaces the Totem of Undying with Ryo 
🧩 Compatible with vanilla gameplay and datapacks  
🔁 Modular asset structure for easy editing and anime swaps  
🛠️ Works with Minecraft 1.16+
